name: Sticky Toffee Pudding
recipeInstructions:
Pudding.
Cream butter and confectioner's sugar until light and fluffy. Gradually beat in eggs.
In a separate bowl, pour boiling water over dates and baking soda. Stir until the water is absorbed. Add flour, then mix in the cream mixture. Pour into a 9-inch x 13-inch cake pan. Bake in a moderate hot oven (350°F) for 40 minutes.
Sauce.
Mix all ingredients and bring to a boil. Once boiling, poke holes in the top of the cake and pour half over it, allowing the sauce to soak in. Brown under the grill before serving. Keep remaining sauce hot and spoon onto warm pieces of cake cut into 3-inch squares. Top with whipped cream.
Recipe collected by Bernie Jurasek from the Udny Arms Hotel in Scotland and shared with Pat Busst circa 1986. Typed by Jack Busst, Calgary, Alberta. 94/02/27
